message.content:
(1) PASS - Welcome section has quick action buttons: Candidatures, Étudiants, Alertes IA, Rapports (visible in top-right).  
(2) PASS - Stat cards have trend indicators: +12% (Total Étudiants), +8% (Nouvelles Candidatures), +5% (Dossiers Validés), -3% (Dossiers Incomplets), +2 (Alertes IA Actives), +2% (Taux d'Assiduité).  
(3) PASS - NEW donut chart 'Répartition par filière' is visible: Shows 8 étudiants au total with colored segments (BTS MCO, etc.) and a legend.  
(4) PASS - NEW 'Classes à risque' panel is visible: Shows classes sorted by lowest moyenne, with risk badges (élevé/moyen/faible) and assiduity bars.  
(5) PASS - All colors use ESGic palette: Blue (active stats, charts), red (negative trends, risk badges), yellow (objectives, stats), orange (alerts).  

New elements: Donut chart 'Répartition par filière' and 'Classes à risque' panel with risk badges/assiduity bars.
